title: selaginella arsenei
intro: Selaginella arsenei, also known as "Spikemoss," is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella arsenei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs.
